creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #6)
Actually I deliberately left the old MAINTAINER in place, because I didn't want to 'steal' someone else's port. That being said, I wouldn't mind maintaining the port in the future if the current maintainer decides to step down. But that doesn't seem too urgent to me and could be done separately. (That would also apply to the update of the print/frescobaldi port.)
